description: woodland - the giant in the outdoor shoe industry, comes up with this rugged shoe with a refined stance. A cheeky take on the classic penny loafer, this four-hole lace up suede shoe references the conservative derby in its styling. Wear this with chinos or denims and a checked casual shirt or a tee. Style this with rugged belts.UpperTwo-tone leather upper with aggressive stitch detailing and embossed branding on the lateral side of the heelStitches on the seams of the toe boxFour-hole lace upsPadded tonguePadded insole for in-step comfortRemovable sockliner to accommodate an orthoticOutsole reinforced onto the upper at the heel MidsoleRubber midsole for cushioned comfortOutsoleDual density TPU outsole with geometric lugs for grip and tractionShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustUse a suede brush to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
